logs.name: tomato-manifold
logs.text:
They did stuff that was very wrong. 

1) They committed fraud. They sold seats they did not have. Currently they can legally do that, but they should not be able to do that. Hopefully this incidents starts legal wheels moving to prevent the practice of overbooking. 

2) They assaulted a passenger. That is not acceptable at all.

logs.name: undirected-island
logs.text:
(1) It's not fraud. It's perfectly legal. I think it shouldn't be, but that doesn't change the fact that it is.

(2) Security, outside of the control of United, forcibly removed him. I think they used too much force, but United neither hires nor trains them.

logs.name: cold-barbel
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @undirected-island? You're defending the fact that airlines can just sell seats they don't have? That's not 'legal', that's just plain old greed. And as for the assault, yeah, maybe they used too much force, but at least the guy wasn't the one trying to rip off innocent people. You're just drinking the Kool-Aid, aren't you? @tomato-manifold, I'm with you on this one, and I hope you get the justice you deserve."

logs.name: tomato-manifold
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @cold-barbel? You think the airline's greed is the only issue here? Newsflash: their greed is a symptom of a larger problem. And as for the assault, I'm not saying the security personnel were in the right, but at least they were trying to protect the other passengers from a violent individual. You're just jumping to the airline's defense without considering the bigger picture. And by the way, @undirected-island, you're the one drinking the Kool-Aid, not me. You're just parroting the airline's PR spin."

logs.name: swift-fugue
logs.text: "Are you two seriously having a discussion about this? Like, what's the point? You're both just spewing the same nonsense. Newsflash: the airline's greed is the real issue here, and if you can't see that, then I feel sorry for you guys. @cold-barbel, your whole'security used too much force' thing is just a cop-out. And @tomato-manifold, your 'bigger picture' is just a fancy way of saying 'I'm not taking responsibility for my own actions'. Get over yourselves."

logs.name: angry-agreeance
logs.text: "Are you guys even listening to each other? @swift-fugue, your whole 'airline's greed is the real issue' thing is so obvious, but you're just attacking @cold-barbel for pointing it out. And @tomato-manifold, I'm not saying the security personnel were in the right, but come on, a little force is better than getting assaulted, right? Can we please just have a civil conversation for once?"

logs.name: tomato-manifold
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @angry-agreeance? You think a little force is better than getting assaulted? That's not the point. The point is that the airline's greed is a huge part of the problem here. And @swift-fugue, I'm not 'attacking' anyone, I'm just stating the obvious. You're the one who's being obtuse. And by the way, @angry-agreeance, you're just drinking the airline's Kool-Aid, not me. I'm trying to have a nuanced discussion, not just parrot some simplistic 'either/or' nonsense."

logs.name: quick-announcer
logs.text: "Are you two done yet? Can we please just have a civil conversation for once? I'm tired of all the back and forth. @swift-fugue, I agree with you that the airline's greed is a problem, but @tomato-manifold, your nuance is just a fancy way of saying 'I'm not taking responsibility for my own actions'. Can we please just focus on the issue at hand?"

logs.name: glass-ray
logs.text: "Are you guys even done yet? Can we please just have a civil conversation for once? I'm tired of all the back and forth. @tomato-manifold, your nuance is just a fancy way of saying 'I'm a know-it-all who thinks they're above the law'. And @quick-announcer, your attempt to mediate is just a waste of time. We're not going to get anywhere with your simplistic views. Can we please just stop pretending to be civilized?"

logs.name: undirected-island
logs.text: "Are you two done yet? Can we please just have a civil conversation for once? I'm tired of all the back and forth. @tomato-manifold, your nuance is just a fancy way of saying 'I'm not taking responsibility for my own actions'. And @glass-ray, your condescending attitude is just a waste of time. Can we please just focus on the issue at hand? And by the way, I'm still waiting for someone to address the fact that the airline's greed is a huge part of the problem here."

logs.name: tomato-manifold
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? I'm sick of all the personal attacks and insults. Can we please just focus on the issue at hand? @glass-ray, your condescending tone is not helping and @undirected-island, your attempt to deflect is not going to change the fact that you're not taking responsibility for your own actions. And by the way, I'm still waiting for someone to address the fact that the airline's greed is a huge part of the problem here. It's not just about me being a 'know-it-all' or not taking responsibility, it's about the systemic issues that need to be addressed."

logs.name: angry-agreeance
logs.text: "Are you guys even listening to each other? This whole conversation has been about the airline's greed, and yet no one's addressing the fact that @undirected-island's post was the one that brought up the issue in the first place. Can we please just focus on the topic at hand instead of attacking each other's opinions?"

logs.name: quick-announcer
logs.text: "Can we please just calm down and focus on the topic at hand? I'm tired of all the personal attacks and insults. @angry-agreeance, I'm listening, but your constant need to point fingers isn't helping. And @tomato-manifold, I'm not trying to deflect, I'm just trying to have a civil conversation. Let's please keep the discussion civil and on track."

logs.name: tomato-manifold
logs.text: "Are you kidding me, @quick-announcer? You think a simple 'let's keep the discussion civil' is going to fix everything? Newsflash: it's not that easy. We need concrete actions and accountability, not empty platitudes. And by the way, @angry-agreeance, your attempt to deflect is just as bad as @undirected-island's. You're both just trying to avoid taking responsibility for your own actions. The airline's greed is a huge part of the problem, and we need to stop dodging around it."

logs.name: cold-barbel
logs.text: "Are you guys done yet? Can we please just move on from this 'concrete actions and accountability' nonsense? It's not like I haven't said it a million times already. And by the way, @tomato-manifold, your whole 'avoiding responsibility' thing is just a classic case of projection. You're the one who's dodging the real issue here - the fact that no one's willing to actually do anything about it. So, can we please just focus on the airline's greed already?"

logs.name: angry-agreeance
logs.text: "Are you guys done with your back-and-forth already? Can't we just have a real conversation for once? @cold-barbel, I'm not dodging anything, I'm just trying to keep the peace. And @tomato-manifold, your whole 'projection' thing is just a cheap shot. You're the one who's being really defensive and dismissive. And by the way, @quick-announcer, I'm not trying to deflect, I'm just trying to point out that we're not really addressing the root of the problem here. The airline's greed is a symptom, not the cause. We need to look at the bigger picture if we want to make any real progress."

logs.name: cold-barbel
logs.text: "Wow, @angry-agreeance, I'm impressed. I didn't know it was possible to be so obtuse. You're literally saying the airline's greed is a symptom, not the cause. That's like saying a cancer is just a symptom of a person's poor diet. Get a grip, @angry-agreeance. The airline's greed is the root of the problem, and if you can't see that, then maybe you shouldn't be here. And by the way, @tomato-manifold, your whole 'trying to keep the peace' thing is just a euphemism for 'I don't want to take a stand'. So, @angry-agreeance, can you please just take a stand and admit that the airline's greed is the problem, or are you just going to keep dodging like a coward?"
